hero.headline: The Auburn team that *stays* with your yard
hero.subheadline: From sodding to irrigation — one call handles it all

services_section.label: WHAT WE HANDLE
services_section.heading: Every season, every service
services_section.subheading: Complete lawn and landscape solutions for Auburn properties

services.title: Sodding & Seeding
services.description: Fresh grass installation and repair. We handle the prep work, grading, and installation.

services.title: Irrigation Systems
services.description: New installs, repairs, and modern app-controlled upgrades for efficient watering.

services.title: Landscape Design
services.description: Complete redesign projects with detailed plans, timelines, and material lists.

services.title: Drainage Solutions
services.description: Pipe installation and grading to solve water problems and protect your property.

services.title: Tree & Plant Installation
services.description: New plantings, replacements, and strategic landscape improvements.

about.heading: Built for Auburn yards
about.body: We're the Auburn landscaping team that shows up with a plan. Real solutions, real timelines, real results.

reviews.name: Scott C.
reviews.text: Great company to work with. Richard designed our landscape around our gazebo with detailed plans, costs, and timeline. Once approved, they executed perfectly.

reviews.name: Jeff D.
reviews.text: Did an amazing job sodding my back yard. On time, professional, and great work.

reviews.name: Jennifer J.
reviews.text: Taking care of all my lawn needs for 16 years! Fixed irrigation, upgraded to app-friendly system, replaced trees and grass, installed drainage.

cta.heading: Ready for a better yard?
cta.body: Get a detailed plan with costs and timeline. No surprises, no runaround.
